name: brainpp
description: Clear dependency confusion / typosquatting against non-PyPI packages without any code inside. Target: the package that either existed earlier in PyPI or is available only in some mirrors, e.g.: https://github.com/YuchenFan48/slime/blob/cf2012f1505d8f6c35bf0af8254dfc3c61c58ef2/scripts/run-qwen3-next-h.sh#L66
